inputs.label: standard
inputs.title: How to Write a Documentary Treatment That Gets Funded
inputs.summary: A step-by-step guide to writing a documentary treatment, covering structure, tone, and the common mistakes that lose funding. Includes a downloadable template.

inputs.title: Podcast Audience Growth in 2026

inputs.label: european
inputs.title: Press Freedom in the EU: 2025 Annual Report
inputs.summary: A comprehensive analysis of press freedom conditions across all 27 EU member states, with country-by-country rankings, notable legal cases, and policy recommendations from the European press freedom index.
inputs.audience: Journalists, policymakers, and press freedom advocates
